title: UK’s Starmer Urges Return to Diplomatic Process for US, Iran
description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer comments following US and Israeli strikes on Iran. Starmer extended the UK’s support and solidarity to its allies in the region and urged Tehran to avoid further escalation. (Source: Bloomberg)
content: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer comments following US and Israeli strikes on Iran. Starmer extended the UK’s support and solidarity to its allies in the region and urged Tehran to avoid further escalation. (Source: Bloomberg)
